text: Match the term "MAKING WAY THROUGH WATER" with the most suitable answers given below

options.text: One prolonged blast every two minutes
One prolonged blast followed by two short

explanation: The COLREGs define sound signals for vessels. 'Making way through water' means the vessel is underway and moving. The prescribed sound signal for a power-driven vessel making way through the water, when not otherwise required to be making sound signals, is one prolonged blast every two minutes.
